title: AI Ecosystems: Claude vs. SAP/Salesforce & Living Artifacts Explained! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses trade-offs in AI ecosystems, comparing expensive AI queries against self-updating living artifacts. The video examines cost-effectiveness considerations for integrating AI into dynamic systems like those provided by SAP and Salesforce.
writeup: Cyril Imhof weighs trade-offs in AI ecosystems, contrasting expensive per-query AI calls against self-updating "living artifacts." The discussion centers on cost-effectiveness when integrating AI into dynamic enterprise systems such as SAP and Salesforce. The takeaway: living artifacts that update themselves offer a cost-efficiency alternative to repeatedly running costly queries.
